title: tenants — entitlements
description: Tenancy does not publish entitlements itself. Entitlements are owned by the `entitlements` module and seeded per `BusinessType.default_config.entitlements` at tenant provisioning time. This file documents the SHAPE contract so consumers can typecheck what a BusinessType entry may seed, and enumerates the four entitlement KINDS the platform supports.

kinds.description: Countable slots (e.g. `athletes.max=100`). Consumed one-per-row. Refused with 402 when at cap.
Consumable pool (e.g. `sms_credits.month=500`). Decremented on use, reset on period roll.
Feature toggle expressed as an entitlement (e.g. `ai_assistant.enabled=true`). Redundant with feature-flag when a plan gates a feature.
Denotes 'no cap' for a normally-slotted resource. `remaining` is `null` on the wire.
